description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OSX that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix job strategy to run on macOS 13, 14, and 15 environments concurrently, cancelling any in-progress jobs. For each job, check out the code, set up a mamba environment from environment-dev.yml, configure the build with cmake, build the project with ninja, and run tests.
